resources.name: Help Teacher Backend
resources.description: API collection for Help Teacher Backend

resources.name: Subscriptions
resources.description: Subscription management endpoints (trial-based: 7-day trial on first subscription, no FREE tier)

resources.name: ASAAS Webhooks
resources.description: ASAAS webhook endpoints. Supported events: PAYMENT_CREATED, PAYMENT_CONFIRMED, PAYMENT_RECEIVED, PAYMENT_OVERDUE, SUBSCRIPTION_INACTIVATED, SUBSCRIPTION_DELETED

resources.name: Update Me
resources.description: Update current user. At least one of 'locale' or 'password' must be provided. If 'password' is set, 'currentPassword' is required.

resources.name: Change Plan
resources.description:
Change subscription plan. Behavior depends on current state:
- No subscription + first trial: returns subscription (local trial, no payment)
- No subscription + trial used: returns checkoutUrl (Asaas checkout)
- Active trial: switches plan locally, returns subscription
- Active + upgrade: returns invoiceUrl for prorated payment
- Active + downgrade/lateral: deferred to next billing cycle, returns subscription
- Expired/canceled/past_due: returns checkoutUrl (resubscription)

resources.name: Cancel Subscription
resources.description: Cancel subscription. Trial subscriptions are canceled immediately. Active subscriptions are scheduled for cancellation at the end of the current billing period. Also cleans up any pending proration upgrade payments.

resources.name: Reactivate Subscription
resources.description: Undo a pending cancellation. Restores the subscription so it continues renewing normally.

resources.name: Webhook - PAYMENT_CREATED
resources.description: Fired when ASAAS creates the first payment after checkout. Stores the ASAAS subscription ID on the user subscription. Standalone proration payments are ignored here.

resources.name: Webhook - PAYMENT_CONFIRMED
resources.description: Fired when a payment is confirmed. Handles: (1) standalone proration payments → applies upgrade immediately, (2) subscription payments → activates subscription, applies pending plan changes.

resources.name: Webhook - PAYMENT_OVERDUE
resources.description: Fired when a payment becomes overdue. Handles: (1) standalone proration payments → clears pending upgrade, user keeps current plan, (2) subscription payments → sets subscription to PAST_DUE.

resources.name: Webhook - SUBSCRIPTION_INACTIVATED
resources.description: Fired when a subscription is canceled/inactivated in ASAAS. Sets status to CANCELED.

resources.name: Webhook - PAYMENT_RECEIVED
resources.description: Fired when a payment is received. Same handling as PAYMENT_CONFIRMED: processes proration payments or activates subscription.

resources.name: Webhook - SUBSCRIPTION_DELETED
resources.description: Fired when a subscription is deleted in ASAAS. Sets status to CANCELED (same handling as SUBSCRIPTION_INACTIVATED).

resources.name: Webhook - Proration Payment Confirmed
resources.description: Simulates a standalone proration payment confirmation. The payment.id must match a proration_asaas_payment_id stored on a user_subscription. On confirmation, the pending upgrade is applied immediately and the Asaas subscription is reconfigured.

resources.name: Webhook - Proration Payment Overdue
resources.description: Simulates a standalone proration payment going overdue. Clears the pending upgrade state — user keeps their current plan.

resources.name: Status
resources.description: Health check endpoint (public, no auth required)

resources.name: Get Status
resources.description: Returns API health status including version, environment, Node.js version, overall status (healthy/degraded/unhealthy), and dependency checks (database, storage, payments, email). No authentication required.
